Missing Skip Navigation Link Test Page

This page has 8 navigation links before the <main> element, but no skip link. Keyboard users must tab through all 8 navigation links on every page load before reaching the main content.

A proper skip link would look like: <a href="#main-content">Skip to main content</a> placed before the navigation, allowing keyboard users to jump directly to the content.

Back to index
